name: ios-simulator
description: Build the current repo's iOS app with xcodebuild and run it on the iOS Simulator.

interface.shortDescription: Build the current repo's iOS app with xcodebuild and run it on the iOS Simulator. Use when the user asks to build, run, install, or interact
interface.longDescription: Build the current repo's iOS app with xcodebuild and run it on the iOS Simulator. Use when the user asks to build, run, install, or interact with their app on the simulator.
